evals.name: BGP attribute implementation
evals.prompt: How does BIRD implement the BGP LOCAL_PREF attribute?
evals.expected_output: Cites proto/bgp/attr.c and explains the attribute encoding/decoding path.

evals.name: Filter function location
evals.prompt: Where is the bgp_path.prepend filter function implemented?
evals.expected_output: Points to filter/f-inst.c or equivalent and mentions the prepend function.
